channel.title: Mathematica Slovaca
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in Mathematica Slovaca

item.title: Generalized Sasaki mappings in d0-Algebras
item.description: Article by Anatolij Dvurečenskij DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ms-2025-0001

item.description: Article by Anatolij Dvurečenskij DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ms-2025-0002

item.description: Article by Anatolij Dvurečenskij DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ms-2025-0003

item.description: Article by Anatolij Dvurečenskij DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ms-2025-0004

item.description: Article by Anatolij Dvurečenskij DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ms-2025-0005

item.description: Article by Anatolij Dvurečenskij DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ms-2025-0006

item.description: Article by Anatolij Dvurečenskij DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ms-2025-0007

item.description: Article by Anatolij Dvurečenskij DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ms-2025-0011
